description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This signature leather belt from wrangler is all set to pump up your style. Pair it with semi-formals. Length: 107 cm Width: 3.8 cm Made of pure leather Buckle and holes with a fixed loop to customise Fit Metallic embellishments for style Brand name embossed on the tail Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
